title: Codex JSONL Record
description: One line of a Codex session file. Each record has a timestamp, type, and payload. The payload structure varies by type.

type.description: Payload subtype: 'message', 'function_call', 'function_call_output', 'reasoning' for response_item; varies for others

role.description: Message role (only present when payload.type is 'message')

content.description: Message content — string or array of content blocks like {type: 'input_text', text: '...'}

call_id.description: Tool call ID (for function_call and function_call_output)

output.description: Tool output — string or array of content blocks (only for function_call_output)
